findings.title: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.actual_results:
Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds

URL: https://www.samcomf.com/help-support/about-samco-flexi-cap-fund/

Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.84 (foreground color: #999999, background color: #ffffff, font size: 9.8pt (13px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Jan 24, 2022" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "2 min read" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"


Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.92 (foreground color: #979797, background color: #ffffff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "NFO period" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "Type of scheme" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "Plans" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "Minimum Application Amount of scheme" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "Minimum Additional Application Amount" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "Minimum SIP Amount" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "Entry Load" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "Exit Load" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "Fund Manager" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "Benchmark Index" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"


Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.25 (foreground color: #1a91f8, background color: #ffffff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Help and Support" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"


Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.84 (foreground color: #999999, background color: #ffffff, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Copyright © 2021 Samco Asset Management Private Ltd. | All Rights Reserved" in Footer section
findings.incorrect_code:
Jan 24, 2022
2 min read
NFO period Type of scheme Plans Minimum Application Amount of scheme Minimum Additional Application Amount Minimum SIP Amount Entry Load Exit Load Fund Manager Benchmark Index Help and Support
Copyright © 2021 Samco Asset Management Private Ltd. | All Rights Reserved
findings.recommendation:
Adjust foreground/background colors so text and interactive controls meet WCAG 2 AA contrast thresholds (minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text).
- Adjust text/background colors until contrast reaches at least 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text.
- Re-check hover/focus/visited states of links and buttons to keep contrast compliant in all states.

findings.title: Heading levels should only increase by one
findings.actual_results:
Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct

URL: https://www.samcomf.com/help-support/about-samco-flexi-cap-fund/

Heading order invalid
- "#about-samco-flexi-cap-fund" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
findings.recommendation:
Use a logical heading hierarchy (h1 to h6) without skipping levels.
- Review affected elements and apply semantic HTML updates required by this rule.
- Retest after fixes and verify no violations remain.

any.message: Heading order invalid

raw_nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Heading order invalid

findings.title: Links must have discernible text
findings.actual_results: Ensure links have discernible text URL: https://www.samcomf.com/help-support/about-samco-flexi-cap-fund/ Accessible name is missing. Add a visible label/text, or provide aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title as appropriate. - "a" in "About Samco Flexi Cap Fund" - "a" in "What is the minimum Lock-in Samco Flexi Cap Fund?" - "a" in "What is the minimum SIP amount I can invest in Samco Flexi Cap Fund?"
findings.recommendation:
Give every link an accessible name that clearly describes its destination or action.
- Ensure each link has clear, unique visible text describing destination/action.
- Avoid generic labels like "click here" or "read more" without context.
- Reference: https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/link/
findings.correct_code: Descriptive link text Descriptive link text Descriptive link text
